summary: Iteration 17 - Tested Beat Purchase Checkout, Email Receipts, Release Wizard (5-step), Instrumentals Page Buy Buttons. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/beats - returns beats list (public, no auth required)
GET /api/beats/{beat_id} - returns single beat details with prices
Frontend: Landing page loads with Featured Beats section
Frontend: Instrumentals page shows 6 beats with buy buttons
Frontend: Purchase modal opens with 4 license tiers (Basic $29.99, Premium $79.99, Unlimited $149.99, Exclusive $499.99)
Frontend: Purchase modal has 'BUY NOW' button with correct price
Frontend: Pricing page shows 3 plans (Free, Rise, Pro) with CTA buttons
Frontend: Release Wizard shows 5-step progress indicator
Frontend: Release Wizard Step 1 (Release Info) - title, type, genre, date fields
Frontend: Release Wizard Step 2 (Cover Art) - upload area visible
Frontend: Release Wizard Step 3 (Tracks) - Add Track button, track list
Frontend: Release Wizard Step 4 (Stores) - 10 DSP stores selectable
Frontend: Release Wizard Step 5 (Review) - Summary with Submit for Review button
Frontend: Release Wizard creates release via POST /api/releases on Step 1 completion
critical_code_review_comments: Beat purchase checkout correctly creates Stripe checkout session with beat_id, license_type, and origin_url
Email receipt endpoint stores receipt in DB and attempts email send (graceful degradation if Resend not configured)
Release Wizard 5-step flow: Release Info → Cover Art → Tracks → Stores → Review
Instrumentals page buy buttons open purchase modal with all 4 license tiers
All DSP stores (10) available for distribution selection
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo beats (6 beats seeded on startup)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 tested new features: Beat purchase checkout with Stripe (POST /api/beats/purchase/checkout), email receipts (POST /api/receipts/send), Release Wizard 5-step flow (/releases/new), and instrumentals page buy buttons with purchase modal. All 4 license tiers work: basic_lease ($29.99), premium_lease ($79.99), unlimited_lease ($149.99), exclusive ($499.99). 6 demo beats in catalog. 10 DSP stores available for distribution.

mocked_apis.Resend Email: Email sending returns 'email delivery pending' if not configured
mocked_apis.Stripe: Uses test API key (sk_test_emergent) - creates real checkout URLs

email_receipts.graceful_degradation: Returns 'email delivery pending' if Resend not configured
